steps.title: Launch + GBP connection
steps.desc: We publish, connect your site to Google, and set up tracking based on your plan.

whatYouGet: Ideas to improve your visibility on Google

examples.ctaSubtitle: Message me and I’ll show relevant references.

items.a: No. I handle the technical side. You only approve content and design.

items.q: What if I already have a site?
items.a: We’ll review it. If improving makes sense, we optimize. If replacing is better, we do it—no drama.
Depending on the plan: 5, 10 or 14 business days (if content arrives on time).

items.q: Does it include domain and hosting?
items.a: Yes. We include a .com domain for 1 year and hosting. Renewals stay under your ownership.

items.q: Can the site be in English?
items.a: Yes. We do ES/EN with a toggle for tourist‑friendly or international businesses.
We set up tracking + structure for campaigns: Tag Manager, events and a dedicated landing page (by plan).
50% upfront, 50% on delivery. Payment methods: bank transfer, PayPal, and Sinpe (CR).

items.q: What do you need from me to start?
items.a: Photos, services, coverage area, hours and your WhatsApp. If you have a GBP, the link helps.

items.q: How long does it take to launch a website?
items.a: Most sites go live in 5–14 business days, depending on the plan and how fast content is provided.

items.q: Do I need to provide photos?
items.a: Photos help a lot, but if you don’t have them we can start with professional stock images and replace them later.

items.q: Can I update the site later?
items.a: Yes. You can request updates anytime. We can also set up a simple maintenance plan if you want ongoing help.
Ads management isn’t included, but the Growth plan is structured for future campaigns (tracking, events and landing page).

contact.title: Let’s talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you do and I’ll recommend the right plan. I reply via WhatsApp or email.

footer.tagline: Websites that turn visitors into clients.
